examples.title: Mining Process Pseudocode
examples.description: This pseudocode demonstrates the mining process in Ethereum.
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the mining process in Ethereum, including transaction selection, block creation, hash function, proof-of-work, and block validation.

examples.title: Mining Process Python Example
examples.description: This Python example demonstrates the mining process in Ethereum.
examples.code:
import hashlib

# Transaction selection
transactions = select_transactions()

# Block creation
block = create_block(transactions)

# Hash function
hash = hashlib.sha256(block.encode()).hexdigest()

# Proof-of-work
if hash_meets_criteria(hash):
 # Block validation
 validate_block(block)
 # Add block to blockchain
 add_block_to_blockchain(block)
examples.explanation: This Python example demonstrates the mining process in Ethereum, including transaction selection, block creation, hash function, proof-of-work, and block validation.
